---
name: Capability / enhancement
about: Propose work framed intent-first — what should be true after it lands.
title: "<scope>: <concise outcome>"
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Intent-first framing. Frame the *why* and *what*, not the *how* — the
implementing session derives the how, with the evidence that only
surfaces during the work. See docs/workflow.md for the full conventions:
https://github.com/dannyfaris/nix-config/blob/main/docs/workflow.md
Delete the guidance comments before submitting.
-->

### Intent

<!-- One or two sentences: what should be true after this lands. The operator's "why". -->

### Scope

<!-- What work needs to happen to satisfy the intent. Say "decide X" / "select X", not "use X" — don't pre-bake the solution. -->

-

### Open decisions for the implementing session

<!-- What is deliberately NOT pre-decided. Name sibling alternatives so the implementing session knows the consideration space without being steered. Omit the section if there are none. -->

-

### Acceptance

<!-- Checkboxes that define done. -->

- [ ]

### Relates to

<!-- Linked issues, docs, modules. Use a "Depends on #N" line for hard dependencies — GitHub renders it as a relationship. -->

-
